---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability (prefer private disclosure)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

⚠️ **For critical vulnerabilities, please email security@deadswitch.online instead of opening a public issue.**

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (funds at risk, contract exploitable)
- [ ] High (privacy leak, auth bypass)
- [ ] Medium (DoS, error handling)
- [ ] Low (UX, minor info disclosure)

## Component Affected
- [ ] Smart contract (InheritanceVault.sol)
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Description
Technical description of the vulnerability.

## Proof of Concept
Steps to reproduce, or PoC code.

## Suggested Mitigation
How would you fix it?
